The Design Workshop has been operational since 28.12.2021. In the Design Workshop, design studies are carried out as an aid to the course contents in the faculty, design studies are supported within the scope of assisting the courses in the faculty, students' work preparation activities are carried out for various competitions and exhibition activities are carried out. In addition, cooperation studies are carried out with various institutions within the scope of the Design Workshop, and in these studies, our department students follow the activities carried out and contribute to the studies carried out as practice, and have the opportunity to experience and practice the field. In this respect, the department also benefits and creates value for institutions other than itself.
